digest.greeting: Thursday, June 25, Jean. Today is anchored by the 1:00 PM Chicago Debrief - EPMO, the compressed transition and midyear block from 1:30 to 3:00 PM, Tudo Bem at 3:00 PM, and IT Litify Sprint #13 Planning at 4:00 PM. Outlook shows 8 calendar blocks, 3 carried-over items, 0 active reminders for today, and 1 urgent item. Keep the morning centered on finishing the KPI SMART goals, using Sara's Chicago update to understand priority shifts, confirming the PM/PE and Court transition impacts, and keeping Send Letters Queue and ICE Preparedness risks from drifting. Broad Teams recent-thread discovery hit a Microsoft 403, but targeted Teams list and chat reads worked.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: This remains the urgent carry-over with a priority reaction in state. Use the 12:00 PM blocked space or the first clear gap after the debrief to turn the KPI set into a small leadership-ready group of goals rather than a loose metric list.

items.label: Update Jorge's project sheet for Jill's portfolio
items.detail: Finish the tracker update for Jill's June 30 portfolio meeting, including active, rejected, completed, and IT-evaluation status. The EPMO debrief may change priorities, so keep the sheet clean enough to absorb updates without rework.

items.label: Schedule July 1 alignment follow-ups
items.detail: Thiago, Gustavo, and Nico were told the new alignment is effective July 1 and agreed it makes sense. Use Sara's cleaned-up org chart and today's transition conversations to schedule the right follow-up time before the week closes.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day has one protected midday focus block, then a dense 1:00-4:30 PM run where the Chicago debrief, transition topics, midyear calendar status, team forum, and sprint planning all stack tightly.

items.label: 1:1 Santiago & Jean
items.detail: Useful early checkpoint for any SharePoint/List export friction or Phase 2 support questions that surfaced in the team chat yesterday.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Best focus window of the day. Use it for KPI SMART goals, Jorge's project sheet, or a quick prep pass before the EPMO debrief.

items.label: Chicago Debrief - EPMO
items.detail: Sara said the Chicago meeting produced several good but material impacts on in-progress work. Treat this as the day's main context reset.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Short BCP/IR touchpoint immediately after the debrief. Tessa Lawrence declined, so avoid assuming all legal context will be live in the room.

items.label: Eugenia & Jean PM/PE Transition Plan
items.detail: Transition conversation focused on Laura's projects, skills, and PM/PE movement. Sara's note says Court priorities may shift and Eugenia may be needed longer for historical context.

items.label: Jean Midyear
items.detail: Calendar still shows this meeting, but Sara said she is moving midyear reviews to Monday. Watch for an updated invite so the slot does not create confusion.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum. Good place to reinforce CoE recognition, surface any transition blockers, and decide which items need owners before Friday.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #13 Planning
items.detail: Sprint planning with IT, PMs, and stakeholders. Use it to listen for sprint capacity implications from SLQ, ICE Preparedness, or Court reprioritization.

items.label: Use the Chicago debrief to reset priorities
items.detail: Sara flagged that the Chicago meeting produced a lot of good context with material impact on in-progress work. Capture what changes for CoE, Court, VAWA, and current project priorities before the afternoon meetings start reinforcing old assumptions.

items.label: Align Court and PM/PE transition implications with Eugenia
items.detail: Sara specifically called out big Court changes and said Eugenia may be needed longer because of her historical context. Use the 2:00 PM transition meeting to separate what moves now from what needs a longer handoff plan.

items.label: Track the Baesman path for Send Letters Queue
items.detail: Jhara told Anu that Procurement is waiting on Baesman's budget submission, the work should be an amendment rather than a new contract, and development discussions with IT are planned for next Tuesday. Confirm whether Jean needs to help keep Anu, IT, or Procurement aligned.

items.label: Pressure-check ICE Preparedness pilot risks
items.detail: Jhara's Asana update shows the pilot is on track, but open risks remain around ELT launch timing, TPA approval, NPS data source, Case Role timing, attorney capacity, and sales fields owed to IT. Decide which of these need airtime in Tudo Bem or tomorrow's EOW check-in.

items.label: Complete the LeadUp Module 2A knowledge check
items.detail: Rippling sent a direct survey request for LeadUp Module 2A / Team Development. This is a small closeout item after yesterday's LeadUp session and should not compete with the larger transition and KPI work.

items.label: Capture Sara's EPMO Liderazgo update
items.detail: Sara moved midyear reviews to Monday, expects to debrief the group today, praised CoE progress, called out VAWA blocker escalation discipline, and warned that Court priorities will shift. This is the clearest new Teams signal for the day.

items.label: Watch Santiago's SharePoint export issue
items.detail: Santiago could not export SharePoint Lists to Excel while others could, and Andrea offered to send an IT ticket guide. Keep it as a light operational watch item unless it starts blocking Phase 2 tracker work.

items.label: Camilo Vejarano remains out through June 26
items.detail: Yesterday's digest noted Camilo is on vacation through June 26, and he is declined on today's Tudo Bem meeting. Avoid assigning near-term follow-up that depends on him this week.

items.label: David Molano OOO and Sara OOO
items.detail: Friday shows all-day OOO blocks for David and Sara, which makes today's debrief and transition alignment more important.

items.label: Update Weekly Deck
items.detail: Short weekly deck update with Mar. Good place to make sure today's debrief changes do not get lost.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: CoE sync with Mar and David. David's all-day OOO may affect attendance, so confirm whether this still holds.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: EOW check-in with Sara, Eugenia, Janet, Jorge, Nadia, and Danny. Outlook still shows Jean has not responded.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Weekly executive-project slide update, now on Fridays. Mar has declined this instance.
